description_long: This guard rail features a robust rectangular frame constructed from what appears to be painted metal, finished in a deep blue color. Four evenly spaced vertical posts support the structure, each connected by a diamond-patterned metal mesh that provides both visibility and a physical barrier. The top and bottom rails are thick and flat, giving the guard rail a solid, stable appearance suitable for urban environments such as sidewalks, parks, or parking garages. The mesh infill is securely attached to the posts, preventing passage while allowing airflow and partial visibility. The ends of the guard rail are blunt and squared off, with no visible flaring or tapering. The overall design is utilitarian, prioritizing safety and durability over decorative elements.
description: A sturdy blue metal guard rail with four vertical posts and diamond-patterned mesh infill, featuring a flat top and bottom rail. The design is functional and secure, ideal for urban safety barriers.
description_view_0: Front view showing four vertical posts and the full expanse of the diamond-patterned mesh between them.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the narrow profile of the guard rail and the thickness of the top and bottom rails.
description_view_2: Rear view, nearly identical to the front, displaying the mesh and post arrangement from the opposite side.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the slim profile and the depth of the base and top rail.
